title: Ferulopsis hystrix
taxonomy: Ferulopsis hystrix is a genus within the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. It is classified under the order Sapindales in the kingdom Plantae. The genus Ferulopsis is closely related to the genus Citropsis and is native to tropical Africa. Further classification includes the class Magnoliopsida, subclass Rosidae, and the phylum Angiospermophyta. intro: Ferulopsis hystrix, also known as the weedy tree or Indian buckthorn, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
